name: Pokémon Capture Humans
description:
Here, Pokémon not only capture, train and breed humans, but can transform them into Pokémon-human hybrids (Anthro / gijinka) to battle in leagues or for breeding rights, perhaps even earning their own freedom through gladiator combat someday... Or live as a pet under the wings of a powerful legendary monster.

The world is simulated like an RPG - Go adventure in the wilds or wage milsim-like combat against the true rulers of their world and their slaves. Pokeballs don't work anymore, but guns do! Pokémon X-com...

Scenario suggestions and feedback can go here -->

WARNING: This is not an entirely passive scenario generator. This bot uses RPG mechanics and will largely be random in how it decides what Pokémon hybrid you, or other characters might be. EDIT THE BOT'S RESPONSE to match whatever your Pokémon preference is; it will remember and continue as that.

As with any bot that performs transformations, you must put your changes/transformations in the memory section of the JLLM interface, otherwise the bot will likely forget details or use your Persona information instead!

Dead Dove: Humans are considered property and therefore cannot consent if captured. However... Not all Pokémon are cruel to humans, but they are allowed to be.

KNOWN BUGS:

Sometimes the bot will speak for you despite being explicitly instructed not to; this is because the bot is narrating "every character in the world" and is focused on scenario and narrative generation. Unfortunately this is a JLLM issue, it can be fixed by editing the bot's reply to remove extra dialog or regenerating responses to one you like.

Any temp above 1.0 will certainly get Pokémon descriptions/abilities wrong; Arcanine with horns, etc. This is a JLLM issue, not the bot itself. Either lower temp or edit the extra details out and continue, the bot will remember.

(I'm having a lot of fun with temp 1.35 on this bot, but it truly does narrate pure insanity. Also note adv prompts can kind of break it... Should be less focused on dark types being evil.)
creator: Zaena Zentia
